title: 11 teas for elderly with stomach pain
description: Cinchona officinalis teas have been used for centuries to help alleviate stomach pain. The tea's active compounds, including quinine and alkaloids like cinchonine and cinchonidine, have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties that help calm stomach muscles and reduce inflammation. Quinine, in particular, has a natural ability to relax the stomach and reduce acid production. This makes Cinchona officinalis teas a popular natural remedy for stomach pain, nausea, and indigestion.  ...
